name: octo-apm-db-slow-spans
description: Span query for SQL and connection spans above the operator threshold. Pivot to Log Analytics db-slowness-hotspots and DB Management by TraceId and SQL attributes.
queryText: show (spans) TraceId, ServiceName as Service, OperationName as Operation, SpanDuration as Duration where ServiceName in ('octo-drone-shop','octo-drone-shop-oke','enterprise-crm-portal','enterprise-crm-portal-oke','octo-workflow-gateway','octo-workflow-gateway-oke') and SpanDuration > 250 and (OperationName like '%SELECT%' or OperationName like '%INSERT%' or OperationName like '%UPDATE%' or OperationName like '%connect%')
